knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Three swimbait styles for different conditions: Bulkier hollow-body for slower presentations — great prespawn and stained water for extra vibration. Subtle finesse swimbaits (like Swimming Shiner) for clear water and tough bites on bright days. Mid-action swimbaits like Caffeine Shad as all-around choice — weedless through grass on screw-lock hook, vary head weight from 1/8oz shallow to 3/8oz deep. If bass follow but won't bite, adjust style, action, color, or speed.'
